hooks.command: $d = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = [IO.Path]::GetFileName($d.tool_input.file_path); if ($f -in 'prepare.py','run.py','demo.py') { @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PreToolUse';permissionDecision='deny';permissionDecisionReason='This file is frozen. Only model.py should be edited during autoresearch.'}} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3 -Compress }
